title: PageDocument
description: Tenant-scoped record that binds a content page to a template and stores widget placement for each region. Frozen at v1 — see 'Page Document Shape — Frozen at v1' in specs/crosscut/page-templates.md. The WidgetInstance entry shape is reused from page-layout.v1.json to guarantee one widget-entry shape across the platform.

pageId.description: Tenant-scoped page identifier (kebab-case). Stable across template changes.

templateId.description: Template this page binds to. MUST match a template registered in the active bundle (INV-TEMPLATE-02).

templateVersion.description: Semantic version of the template the page was last saved against. A stored version greater than the registered template's version MUST fail closed at render time (INV-TEMPLATE-08).

regions.description: Map of region name to ordered array of widget instances. Region names MUST exist in the resolved template's manifest (INV-TEMPLATE-02); required regions MUST be non-empty (INV-TEMPLATE-05).

meta.description: Optional page-level metadata (title, slug, SEO fields).

$comment: This shape is frozen at v1. Both InMemoryPageStore and the future HttpPageStore MUST round-trip byte-equivalent. Breaking changes require page-document.v2.json — not an in-place edit. Reuses WidgetInstance from page-layout.v1.json (INV-WIDGET-10 compatibility).
